title: Lifted Horizons
description: Craft and fly hot air balloons with intuitive flight mechanics and customizable designs, all while fitting seamlessly into the vanilla experience. Manage fuel and upgrades.
body:
# Lifted Horizons

![lifted horizons banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/064cc0cc43fdc8ae926122b2987168a65e816e1e.png)

Lifted Horizons allows players to craft and fly their own hot air balloons in Minecraft. This mod enhances exploration with intuitive flight mechanics, all while fitting seamlessly into the vanilla experience. Manage fuel and upgrades to tailor your balloon for your adventures.

---

## Features

### Craft Your Balloon
- Craft a standard hot air balloon using vanilla-style crafting with wool and planks
- Dye your balloon in various colors

### Intuitive Flight Controls
- Easily ascend, descend, and navigate through the Minecraft world
- Experience smooth and responsive controls that feel natural in-game

### Upgrade System
- Three upgrade slots per balloon
- Two tiers of upgrades available
- Upgrades can be stacked for increased effectiveness

### Fuel Management
- Uses standard furnace fuel mechanics and burn times
- Compatible with all existing fuel types in Minecraft

---

## Future Plans
- Additional color options
- Banners
- More wood types
- New upgrades 
- Further refinements to balloon mechanics
